projectsData.title: An integrated web portal to access data sources for public health planning in Bangladesh
projectsData.potentialFundingCategory: Japanese Award for Outstanding Research on Development (ORD) 2022
projectsData.description: The project is titled “Development of an Integrated Web Portal for Accessing Data Sources for Public Health Planning in Bangladesh.” The Global Development Network (GDN) is being considered as a potential funder for the project, under the Japanese Award for Outstanding Research on Development (ORD) 2022 funding category. As of now, the project is under its second review. The proposal was initially submitted on January 6, 2023, and the submission date for the second review was on February 21, 2023.

projectsData.title: Digital Map
projectsData.description: The project involves the development of a digital map for Banglalink Digital Communication Limited. The proposal for the project was submitted on February 20, 2023.

projectsData.title: A Pilot Project on Preparation of Comprehensive Development Plan for Nine Upazilas
projectsData.description: This is an ongoing project titled “A Pilot Project on the Preparation of Comprehensive Development Plan for Nine Upazilas,” which has been awarded Package No. 4 for the Socio-Economic Survey. The project is being carried out for the Urban Development Directorate (UDD), and has received a score of 82.33 out of 100. The Letter of Intent was signed on March 12, 2023.
